description: Create a professional print layout map in QGIS using the administrative zones polygon layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson) and monitoring stations point layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson). Style the layers to be visually distinguishable and create a print layout named 'Bay Area Report' that includes a map item, a legend, a scale bar, and a title label 'Bay Area Monitoring Stations'. Export the final layout as a PNG image to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/bay_area_map.png and save the QGIS project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/bay_area_map.qgz.
